title: 今日唔出手，他日Facebook就會封你帳戶、禁你言／加懶人包：Facebook刪除左游乃強啲黑材料

replies.msg:
Facebook舐共我諗大家都略有所聞，
原來佢誇張到封人account 可以因為人地14年講過嘅嘢，有追溯期


所以今次Now被人刪片係好好既證據




但Facebook調查完竟然好無恥咁話：「相信是出於直播完成後上傳訊號的技術層面原因」

——————————
整左條新片，有中英對照，交代呢件事
一日未推到比外媒一日都唔會放棄
麻煩大家推又好share又好，有渠道比外媒又好，一齊搞掂佢

https://youtu.be/aMrWnXKo15U




——————————

Facebook 政治審查？Now新聞7分鐘敏感片段消失於Facebook
——————————
重點內容:

Now新聞Facebook專頁內有7分鐘片段懐疑被Facebook刪除

7月21日
-元朗暴徒攻擊市民

7月22日凌晨（襲撃後同一個夜晚）
-警察調查元朗南邊圍村
-Now新聞於Facebook Live直播 (1:28am-4:47am)
-其後有人發現7分鐘的內容消失（03:55am 至 04:02am）
-消失的內容，包括警員（游乃強亦在內）與白衫疑兇在村公所密會（4:01am）

Now新聞確認：
當日是不經刪剪地在Facebook Live進行直播

Facebook回應：
-「Facebook Live直播功能也不存在被內容發佈者中間抽起或剪接的可能性」
-7分鐘的內容消失的原因「相信是出於直播完成後上傳訊號的技術層面原因」

英文版：

————————————————————————————————

Facebook Censorship? Sensitive Live materials reported by Now TV News Hong Kong went missing on Facebook
——————————
Key note:

*Facebook was accused of censoring local news station 7-minutes footage

21st July:
-Mobs attack in Yuen Long

Midnight of 22rd July (the same night after the attack)
-HK police investigated the attack in Nam Pin Wai village, Yuen Long
-NowTV broadcasted time on Facebook Live (1:28am-4:47am)
-7 minutes footage was found missing in the archived Facebook video (03:55am-04:02am)
-Missing footages includes police officers and white-shirted triads secret meeting (4:01am)

NowTV confirmed:
-They haven’t edited out any content.

Facebook response:
-“Facebook Live does not allow removal or editing of live content by the publisher given the real-time live streaming nature of the service.”
-The missing of the 7-minute footage: “likely due to technical reasons related to connectivity signals during the uploading process”


————————————————————————————————
